The '''Outer Rim Wars''' were a series of conflicts that were fought<ref name="HSCSS" /> at some point before [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].<ref name="TERC" /> [[Alexsandr Badure]] was a veteran of the Outer Rim Wars.<ref name="HSCSS" />
